sentences.text_original: 你点的外卖到了吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ diǎn de wàimài dào le ma?
sentences.text_translation: Buyurtma qilgan ovqating yetib keldimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Твоя доставка уже пришла?
sentences.text_translation_en: Has the delivery you ordered arrived?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 到了，但是我特别不满意。
sentences.pinyin: Dào le, dànshì wǒ tèbié bù mǎnyì.
sentences.text_translation: Keldi, lekin men juda norozi bo'ldim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Пришла, но я очень недоволен.
sentences.text_translation_en: It did, but I'm really not satisfied.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 怎么了？不好吃吗？
sentences.pinyin: Zěnme le? Bù hǎochī ma?
sentences.text_translation: Nima bo'ldi? Mazasizmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Что такое? Невкусно?
sentences.text_translation_en: What happened? Was it not tasty?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 送得太慢了，等了一个多小时，饭菜都凉了。
sentences.pinyin: Sòng de tài màn le, děng le yí ge duō xiǎoshí, fàncài dōu liáng le.
sentences.text_translation: Juda sekin yetkazishdi, bir soatdan ko'proq kutdim, ovqat sovib qolgan edi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Везли слишком долго, ждал больше часа, и еда совсем остыла.
sentences.text_translation_en: The delivery was too slow — I waited over an hour and the food had gone cold.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那你打算怎么办？
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ dǎsuàn zěnme bàn?
sentences.text_translation: Unda nima qilmoqchisan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: И что ты собираешься делать?
sentences.text_translation_en: So what do you plan to do?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我想给个差评，提醒其他用户。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng gěi ge chàpíng, tíxǐng qítā yònghù.
sentences.text_translation: Yomon sharh qoldirib, boshqa foydalanuvchilarni ogohlantirmoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хочу оставить плохой отзыв, чтобы предупредить других пользователей.
sentences.text_translation_en: I want to leave a bad review to warn other users.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你以前给过差评吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yǐqián gěi guo chàpíng ma?
sentences.text_translation: Avval yomon sharh qoldirganmiding?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты раньше оставлял плохие отзывы?
sentences.text_translation_en: Have you left a bad review before?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 很少。除非真的特别差，我一般不给。
sentences.pinyin: Hěn shǎo. Chúfēi zhēn de tèbié chà, wǒ yìbān bù gěi.
sentences.text_translation: Juda kam. Rostdan ham juda yomon bo'lmasa, odatda qoldirmayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Очень редко. Если только всё совсем плохо, обычно не оставляю.
sentences.text_translation_en: Rarely. Unless it's really bad, I usually don't.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那你这次想写什么？
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ zhè cì xiǎng xiě shénme?
sentences.text_translation: Unda bu safar nima yozmoqchisan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: А что ты хочешь написать на этот раз?
sentences.text_translation_en: So what do you want to write this time?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我想写「送餐太慢，饭菜凉了，希望改进」。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng xiě 'sòng cān tài màn, fàncài liáng le, xīwàng gǎijìn'.
sentences.text_translation: «Ovqat juda sekin yetkazildi, sovib qoldi, yaxshilanishini umid qilaman» deb yozmoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хочу написать: «Доставка слишком медленная, еда остыла, надеюсь на улучшение».
sentences.text_translation_en: I want to write "the delivery was too slow, the food was cold, I hope they improve."
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 会不会太直接了？
sentences.pinyin: Huì bú huì tài zhíjiē le?
sentences.text_translation: Bu juda to'g'ridan-to'g'ri bo'lib qolmaydimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не слишком ли прямо?
sentences.text_translation_en: Isn't that too direct?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不会。我说的是实话，而且语气还算客气。
sentences.pinyin: Bú huì. Wǒ shuō de shì shíhuà, érqiě yǔqì hái suàn kèqi.
sentences.text_translation: Yo'q. Men rost gapni aytyapman, ustiga-ustak ohangi ham ancha xushmuomala.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нет. Я говорю правду, и тон при этом вполне вежливый.
sentences.text_translation_en: No. I'm telling the truth, and the tone is fairly polite.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那你考虑过联系商家退款吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ kǎolǜ guo liánxì shāngjiā tuìkuǎn ma?
sentences.text_translation: Unda sotuvchi bilan bog'lanib, pulni qaytarishni o'ylab ko'rdingmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: А ты не думал связаться с продавцом и вернуть деньги?
sentences.text_translation_en: Have you thought about contacting the seller for a refund?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 想过。但是退款麻烦，而且我也吃了。
sentences.pinyin: Xiǎng guo. Dànshì tuìkuǎn máfan, érqiě wǒ yě chī le.
sentences.text_translation: O'ylab ko'rdim. Lekin pulni qaytarish mashaqqatli, ustiga-ustak men uni yeb ham bo'ldim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Думал. Но возврат — это морока, к тому же я её уже съел.
sentences.text_translation_en: I have. But getting a refund is a hassle, and I already ate it.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那就给个差评吧，让商家知道问题在哪里。
sentences.pinyin: Nà jiù gěi ge chàpíng ba, ràng shāngjiā zhīdào wèntí zài nǎli.
sentences.text_translation: Unda yomon sharh qoldir, sotuvchi muammo qayerdaligini bilsin.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда оставь плохой отзыв, пусть продавец знает, в чём проблема.
sentences.text_translation_en: Then leave a bad review so the seller knows where the problem is.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对。如果商家看到以后能改进，也是好事。
sentences.pinyin: Duì. Rúguǒ shāngjiā kàn dào yǐhòu néng gǎijìn, yě shì hǎoshì.
sentences.text_translation: To'g'ri. Agar sotuvchi ko'rib, keyin yaxshilansa, bu ham yaxshi narsa.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да. Если продавец увидит и потом исправится, это тоже хорошо.
sentences.text_translation_en: Right. If the seller sees it and improves afterward, that's a good thing too.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你说的有道理。我上次也遇到过类似的情况。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de yǒu dàoli. Wǒ shàng cì yě yùdào guo lèisì de qíngkuàng.
sentences.text_translation: Gaping mantiqli. Men ham o'tgan safar shunga o'xshash holatga duch kelganman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты прав. В прошлый раз я тоже сталкивался с похожей ситуацией.
sentences.text_translation_en: You have a point. Last time I ran into a similar situation too.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那你当时怎么处理的？
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ dāngshí zěnme chǔlǐ de?
sentences.text_translation: Unda o'shanda buni qanday hal qilding?
sentences.text_translation_ru: И как ты тогда с этим разобрался?
sentences.text_translation_en: So how did you handle it back then?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我给了三星，没写差评，但是把问题写出来了。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ gěi le sān xīng, méi xiě chàpíng, dànshì bǎ wèntí xiě chūlái le.
sentences.text_translation: Uch yulduz qo'ydim, yomon sharh yozmadim, lekin muammoni yozib qoldirdim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я поставил три звезды, плохой отзыв не писал, но проблему всё же описал.
sentences.text_translation_en: I gave three stars, didn't write a bad review, but did spell out the problem.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那也不错。商家能看到，但不会太生气。
sentences.pinyin: Nà yě búcuò. Shāngjiā néng kàn dào, dàn bú huì tài shēngqì.
sentences.text_translation: Bu ham yaxshi. Sotuvchi ko'ra oladi, lekin uncha jahli chiqmaydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Это тоже неплохо. Продавец увидит, но не сильно разозлится.
sentences.text_translation_en: That's good too. The seller can see it but won't get too angry.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 对。差评有时候能帮助商家进步。
sentences.pinyin: Duì. Chàpíng yǒu shíhou néng bāngzhù shāngjiā jìnbù.
sentences.text_translation: To'g'ri. Yomon sharh ba'zan sotuvchining oldinga siljishiga yordam beradi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да. Плохой отзыв иногда помогает продавцу стать лучше.
sentences.text_translation_en: Right. A bad review can sometimes help a seller improve.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 希望我这个差评也能有用。我现在就写。
sentences.pinyin: Xīwàng wǒ zhè ge chàpíng yě néng yǒuyòng. Wǒ xiànzài jiù xiě.
sentences.text_translation: Mening bu sharhim ham foydali bo'lishini umid qilaman. Hozir yozaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Надеюсь, и мой отзыв окажется полезным. Сейчас же напишу.
sentences.text_translation_en: I hope my review can be useful too. I'll write it right now.
sentences.speaker: B
